title: oenothera cheiranthifolia subsp. suffruticosa
intro: Oenothera cheiranthifolia subsp. suffruticosa, also known as the shrubby evening primrose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Onagraceae. The medicinal properties of Oenothera cheiranthifolia subsp. suffruticosa include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, providing potential health benefits such as improved cardiovascular health, reduced risk of cancer, and enhanced cognitive function. Oenothera cheiranthifolia subsp. suffruticosa can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to support eye health and immune function.
